channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title:
Pro tip: use GPT Images 2.0 to make your images higher-res
The bottom was made in Figma with screen...
item.description:
Pro tip: use GPT Images 2.0 to make your images higher-res
The bottom was made in Figma with screenshots
This one was touched up by ChatGPT https://t.co/TXacLUNMjK
--- @nickbaumann_ | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 72
item.author: @nickbaumann_

item.title:
really incredible what you're now able to create with a little bit of compute.
excited for new appl...
item.description:
really incredible what you're now able to create with a little bit of compute.
excited for new applications in areas like education, professional settings (slides, marketing materials, etc), and productivity (such as creating diagrams for code documentation). https://t.co/M9xWFXEseI
--- @gdb | ❤️ 115 | 🔁 5 | 💬 18 | 👁 4866
item.author: @gdb

item.title:
Access GPT Image 2.0 natively in Hermes Agent
Update now to get access - just run `hermes update` a...
item.description:
Access GPT Image 2.0 natively in Hermes Agent
Update now to get access - just run `hermes update` and select your image generation tool model with `hermes tools`
--- @NousResearch | ❤️ 55 | 🔁 3 | 💬 6 | 👁 1456
item.author: @NousResearch
